title: Aei Ama Sansara
desc: Gungun shares her priorities as a privileged surgeon's daughter, while Patka later tells a suspenseful tale to the family, stirring curiosity and setting the mood.

title: Aboli
desc: A story of hope and resilience where a woman overcomes numerous challenges, finding love and strength in her life's journey.

title: Shiba Shakti
desc: Lord Shiva and his wife, Goddess Parvati, navigate their relationship and duties and offer sacrifices and brave separation to selflessly care for humanity.

title: Tume Hin Sankha Tume Hin Sindoora
desc: Jitu handles Gopi's wedding plans, while Urmila aims to marry Rashi into the Modi family by arranging Jigar's alliance, steering shifting wedding ambitions.

title: Kemiti Aie Samparka
desc: Exploring complex relationships, misunderstandings, and emotional bonds, this drama delves into family and societal dynamics with care.

title: Tulasi
desc: In a village torn by deep-rooted rivalry, Tulasi fights betrayal, danger, and family pressure as she struggles to protect her forbidden love for Chandan and keep their bond alive.

title: Mahabharat
desc: Bhishma's sacrifice allows Shantanu to marry. Later, royal conflicts lead to curses, births, and divisions. A dice game causes exile for the Pandavas.

title: Jay Shreekrushna
desc: A mythological narrative retelling divine stories of devotion, righteousness, and battles that uphold faith and moral order.
